tree.setup: You are a visiting scholar at a Chinese university. You are meeting with Professor Chen to propose a joint research project on computational linguistics. You need to present your idea persuasively while respecting academic hierarchy.
tree.setup_zh: 你是一所中国大学的访问学者。你正在与陈教授会面，提议一个关于计算语言学的联合研究项目。你需要有说服力地陈述你的想法，同时尊重学术等级。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 欢迎你来我们实验室。听说你在自然语言处理领域有一些独到的见解。我对跨学科的合作一向持开放态度，但也想先听听你的具体构想，看看我们的研究方向是否具有互补性。
turns.text_pinyin: huānyíng nǐ lái wǒmen shíyànshì. tīngshuō nǐ zài zìrán yǔyán chǔlǐ lǐngyù yǒu yīxiē dúdào de jiànjiě. wǒ duì kuà xuékē de hézuò yīxiàng chí kāifàng tàidù, dàn yě xiǎng xiān tīngtīng nǐ de jùtǐ gòuxiǎng, kànkàn wǒmen de yánjiū fāngxiàng shìfǒu jùyǒu hùbǔ xìng.
turns.text_en: Welcome to our lab. I've heard you have some unique insights in the field of natural language processing. I've always been open to interdisciplinary collaboration, but I'd like to first hear your specific vision and see whether our research directions are complementary.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Present your research proposal and explain how the collaboration would benefit both sides.

options.text_zh: 教授的反驳很有力。关于产业政策的容错机制，我承认中国在光伏领域的最终胜出是一个有说服力的案例。但我想引入两个理论视角来深化讨论。第一，从熊彼特的'创造性破坏'理论来看，产业洗牌本身并不证明政策的优越性——它可能恰恰说明市场机制在补贴扭曲之后的自我纠正能力。换句话说，光伏的成功可能不是因为产业政策，而是尽管有产业政策。第二，关于金融体系不成熟的前提——我认为这恰恰是需要质疑的。中国的金融体系'不成熟'在多大程度上是一个客观条件，又在多大程度上是政策选择的结果？如果国有银行长期享有隐性担保和存款利率管制带来的成本优势，民营金融机构自然难以成长。这就形成了一种自我实现的逻辑：因为市场不成熟所以需要政府干预，而政府干预又阻碍了市场的成熟。经济学中称之为'路径依赖'——一旦进入这个循环，退出的制度成本会越来越高。这不是否认政府在特定阶段的必要角色，而是提醒我们警惕将阶段性手段固化为永久性制度安排的风险。
options.text_pinyin: jiàoshòu de fǎnbó hěn yǒulì. guānyú chǎnyè zhèngcè de róngruò jīzhì, wǒ chéngrèn zhōngguó zài guāngfú lǐngyù de zuìzhōng shèngchū shì yī gè yǒu shuōfú lì de ànlì. dàn wǒ xiǎng yǐnrù liǎng gè lǐlùn shìjiǎo lái shēnhuà tǎolùn. dì yī, cóng xióng bǐ tè de 'chuàngzào xìng pòhuài' lǐlùn lái kàn, chǎnyè xǐpái běnshēn bìng bù zhèngmíng zhèngcè de yōuyuè xìng — tā kěnéng qiàqià shuōmíng shìchǎng jīzhì zài bǔtiē niǔqū zhīhòu de zìwǒ jiūzhèng nénglì. huàn jù huà shuō, guāngfú de chénggōng kěnéng bú shì yīnwèi chǎnyè zhèngcè, ér shì jǐnguǎn yǒu chǎnyè zhèngcè. dì èr, guānyú jīnróng tǐxì bù chéngshú de qiántí — wǒ rènwéi zhè qiàqià shì xūyào zhìyí de. zhōngguó de jīnróng tǐxì 'bù chéngshú' zài duō dà chéngdù shàng shì yī gè kèguān tiáojiàn, yòu zài duō dà chéngdù shàng shì zhèngcè xuǎnzé de jiéguǒ? rúguǒ guóyǒu yínháng chángqī xiǎngyǒu yǐnxìng dānbǎo hé cúnkuǎn lìlǜ guǎnzhì dàilái de chéngběn yōushì, mínyíng jīnróng jīgòu zìrán nányǐ chéngzhǎng. zhè jiù xíngchéng le yī zhǒng zìwǒ shíxiàn de luójí: yīnwèi shìchǎng bù chéngshú suǒyǐ xūyào zhèngfǔ gānyù, ér zhèngfǔ gānyù yòu zǔ'ài le shìchǎng de chéngshú. jīngjì xué zhōng chēng zhī wéi 'lùjìng yīlài' — yīdàn jìnrù zhège xúnhuán, tuìchū de zhìdù chéngběn huì yuèláiyuè gāo. zhè bú shì fǒurèn zhèngfǔ zài tèdìng jiēduàn de bìyào juésè, ér shì tíxǐng wǒmen jǐngtì jiāng jiēduàn xìng shǒuduàn gùhuà wéi yǒngjiǔ xìng zhìdù ānpái de fēngxiǎn.
options.text_en: The professor's rebuttal is powerful. Regarding industrial policy's fault-tolerance mechanism, I admit China's ultimate victory in photovoltaics is a persuasive case. But I'd like to introduce two theoretical perspectives to deepen the discussion. First, from the Schumpeterian 'creative destruction' lens, industry shake-outs don't in themselves prove policy superiority — they may precisely demonstrate the market mechanism's self-correcting capacity after subsidy distortions. In other words, photovoltaic success may have occurred not because of industrial policy, but despite it. Second, regarding the premise of financial system immaturity — this is precisely what needs questioning. To what extent is China's financial system 'immature' an objective condition, and to what extent is it a result of policy choices? If state-owned banks long enjoy the cost advantages of implicit guarantees and deposit rate controls, private financial institutions naturally struggle to grow. This creates a self-fulfilling logic: the market is immature so government intervention is needed, but government intervention prevents market maturation. Economics calls this 'path dependence' — once you enter this cycle, the institutional cost of exiting grows ever higher. This isn't denying the government's necessary role at specific stages, but reminding us to be vigilant against solidifying transitional measures into permanent institutional arrangements.
options.feedback: Off-topic — you were asked to present your research proposal and explain how the collaboration would benefit both sides, but this doesn't fit the conversation.

options.text_zh: 陈教授，非常感谢您百忙之中抽出时间。我的构想是将贵团队在古汉语语料库方面的深厚积淀与我们在深度学习模型上的技术优势相结合，探索一套能够自动标注和解析文言文句法结构的系统。这一课题既具有学术前沿性，也能为数字人文领域提供切实可行的工具。如果您感兴趣，我可以进一步阐述技术路径和预期成果。
options.text_pinyin: chén jiàoshòu, fēicháng gǎnxiè nín bǎimáng zhī zhōng chōuchū shíjiān. wǒ de gòuxiǎng shì jiāng guì tuánduì zài gǔ hànyǔ yǔliàokù fāngmiàn de shēnhòu jīdiàn yǔ wǒmen zài shēndù xuéxí móxíng shàng de jìshù yōushì xiāng jiéhé, tànsuǒ yī tào nénggòu zìdòng biāozhù hé jiěxī wényánwén jùfǎ jiégòu de xìtǒng. zhè yī kètí jì jùyǒu xuéshù qiányán xìng, yě néng wèi shùzì rénwén lǐngyù tígōng qièshí kěxíng de gōngjù. rúguǒ nín gǎn xìngqù, wǒ kěyǐ jìnyībù chǎnshù jìshù lùjìng hé yùqī chéngguǒ.
options.text_en: Professor Chen, thank you so much for taking time out of your busy schedule. My vision is to combine your team's deep expertise in classical Chinese corpora with our technical strengths in deep learning models, to explore a system that can automatically annotate and parse the syntactic structures of classical Chinese. This topic is both academically cutting-edge and can provide practical tools for the digital humanities field. If you're interested, I can further elaborate on the technical pathway and expected outcomes.
options.feedback: Excellent — uses 构想, 积淀, 前沿性, 切实可行 with scholarly precision. Acknowledges the professor's strengths first (贵团队的深厚积淀), frames mutual benefit, and offers to elaborate rather than presuming agreement. This respects academic hierarchy perfectly.

options.text_zh: 这个信息非常重要。百分之十四点七和百分之三点二之间的差距——如果属实，这不是统计误差，这是蓄意篡改。肝功能异常的发生率被压缩了将近五倍，意味着大量患者在不知情的情况下承受着远超预期的风险。关于您手中的照片，我有几个建议。第一，这些照片目前存在什么设备上？如果是个人手机，我建议您尽快将原始文件通过加密渠道传输给我们，然后从您的设备上彻底删除——包括云端备份和已删除文件夹。我们有专业的数字安全团队可以协助。第二，除了这些照片，是否还有其他人知道您持有这些材料？如果只有您一个人知道，那泄露的风险相对可控。第三，我需要了解——在提交给药监局的报告中，数据修改这个环节是由谁来执行的？是某个具体的人，还是一个制度化的流程？因为如果我们能证明这是一个有组织的行为而非个人过失，报道的冲击力和法律效力都会显著提升。
options.text_pinyin: zhège xìnxī fēicháng zhòngyào. bǎifēnzhī shísì diǎn qī hé bǎifēnzhī sān diǎn èr zhījiān de chājù — rúguǒ shǔshí, zhè bú shì tǒngjì wùchā, zhè shì xùyì cuàngǎi. gān gōngnéng yìcháng de fāshēng lǜ bèi yāsuō le jiāngjìn wǔ bèi, yìwèi zhe dàliàng huànzhě zài bù zhīqíng de qíngkuàng xià chéngshòu zhe yuǎn chāo yùqī de fēngxiǎn. guānyú nín shǒu zhōng de zhàopiàn, wǒ yǒu jǐ gè jiànyì. dì yī, zhèxiē zhàopiàn mùqián cúnzài shénme shèbèi shàng? rúguǒ shì gèrén shǒujī, wǒ jiànyì nín jǐnkuài jiāng yuánshǐ wénjiàn tōngguò jiāmì qúdào chuánshū gěi wǒmen, ránhòu cóng nín de shèbèi shàng chèdǐ shānchú — bāokuò yúnduān bèifèn hé yǐ shānchú wénjiànjiā. wǒmen yǒu zhuānyè de shùzì ānquán tuánduì kěyǐ xiézhù. dì èr, chúle zhèxiē zhàopiàn, shìfǒu hái yǒu qítā rén zhīdào nín chíyǒu zhèxiē cáiliào? rúguǒ zhǐyǒu nín yī gè rén zhīdào, nà xièlòu de fēngxiǎn xiāngduì kěkòng. dì sān, wǒ xūyào liǎojiě — zài tíjiāo gěi yào jiān jú de bàogào zhōng, shùjù xiūgǎi zhège huánjié shì yóu shéi lái zhíxíng de? shì mǒu gè jùtǐ de rén, háishì yī gè zhìdùhuà de liúchéng? yīnwèi rúguǒ wǒmen néng zhèngmíng zhè shì yī gè yǒu zǔzhī de xíngwéi ér fēi gèrén guòshī, bàodào de chōngjī lì hé fǎlǜ xiàolì dōu huì xiǎnzhù tíshēng.
options.text_en: This information is very important. The gap between 14.7% and 3.2% — if accurate, this isn't statistical error, this is deliberate falsification. The liver function abnormality incidence was compressed nearly fivefold, meaning a large number of patients are bearing risks far exceeding expectations without their knowledge. Regarding the photos in your possession, I have several suggestions. First, what device are these photos currently stored on? If it's a personal phone, I recommend you transfer the original files to us through encrypted channels as soon as possible, then thoroughly delete them from your device — including cloud backups and deleted file folders. We have a professional digital security team that can assist. Second, besides these photos, does anyone else know you possess these materials? If only you know, the leak risk is relatively controllable. Third, I need to understand — in the report submitted to the drug regulatory authority, who executed the data modification step? Was it a specific individual, or an institutionalized process? Because if we can prove this was organized behavior rather than individual negligence, both the impact of the report and its legal weight will be significantly enhanced.
options.feedback: Off-topic — you were asked to present your research proposal and explain how the collaboration would benefit both sides, but this doesn't fit the conversation.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 你提到的方向确实与我们近年来的研究重心有所契合。不过我有一个顾虑：跨机构合作在知识产权归属和经费分担方面往往比较复杂。你对这些问题有何考量？
turns.text_pinyin: nǐ tídào de fāngxiàng quèshí yǔ wǒmen jìnnián lái de yánjiū zhòngxīn yǒusuǒ qìhé. búguò wǒ yǒu yī gè gùlǜ: kuà jīgòu hézuò zài zhīshì chǎnquán guīshǔ hé jīngfèi fēndān fāngmiàn wǎngwǎng bǐjiào fùzá. nǐ duì zhèxiē wèntí yǒu hé kǎoliáng?
turns.text_en: The direction you mentioned does align with our recent research focus. However, I have a concern: cross-institutional collaboration is often complicated regarding intellectual property ownership and funding allocation. What are your thoughts on these issues?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Address the professor's concerns about IP and funding for the joint project.

options.text_zh: 谢谢陈总。我建议我们采取'锚点辐射'的分阶段策略，而非一步到位的全面铺开。具体来说，第一阶段集中资源进入印尼和越南两个市场——根据我们的前期调研数据，这两个国家的数字经济渗透率分别达到了百分之四十二和百分之三十七，且年增长率均超过百分之二十，远高于区域平均水平。更重要的是，两国的监管框架相对成熟，外资准入门槛在过去两年已大幅降低。我们在这两个市场建立稳固的运营基础之后，再以此为跳板向泰国、菲律宾等市场辐射。这样做有三个核心优势：第一，集中投入可以将初期资本需求降低约百分之四十，有效缩短盈亏平衡周期；第二，先行市场积累的本地化经验——包括支付生态对接、用户习惯洞察、合规框架搭建——可以大幅降低后续市场的试错成本；第三，阶段性的业绩验证有助于在董事会层面建立信心，为后续融资提供有力支撑。
options.text_pinyin: xièxiè chén zǒng. wǒ jiànyì wǒmen cǎiqǔ 'máodiǎn fúshè' de fēn jiēduàn cèlüè, ér fēi yī bù dào wèi de quánmiàn pūkāi. jùtǐ lái shuō, dì yī jiēduàn jízhōng zīyuán jìnrù yìnní hé yuènán liǎng gè shìchǎng — gēnjù wǒmen de qiánqī diàoyán shùjù, zhè liǎng gè guójiā de shùzì jīngjì shèntòu lǜ fēnbié dádào le bǎifēnzhī sìshí èr hé bǎifēnzhī sānshí qī, qiě nián zēngzhǎng lǜ jūn chāoguò bǎifēnzhī èrshí, yuǎn gāo yú qūyù píngjūn shuǐpíng. gèng zhòngyào de shì, liǎng guó de jiānguǎn kuàngjià xiāngduì chéngshú, wàizī zhǔnrù ménkǎn zài guòqù liǎng nián yǐ dàfú jiàngdī. wǒmen zài zhè liǎng gè shìchǎng jiànlì wěngù de yùnyíng jīchǔ zhīhòu, zài yǐ cǐ wéi tiàobǎn xiàng tàiguó, fēilǜbīn děng shìchǎng fúshè. zhèyàng zuò yǒu sān gè héxīn yōushì: dì yī, jízhōng tóurù kěyǐ jiāng chūqī zīběn xūqiú jiàngdī yuē bǎifēnzhī sìshí, yǒuxiào suōduǎn yíng kuī pínghéng zhōuqī; dì èr, xiānxíng shìchǎng jīlěi de běndìhuà jīngyàn — bāokuò zhīfù shēngtài duìjiē, yònghù xíguàn dòngchá, héguī kuàngjià dājiàn — kěyǐ dàfú jiàngdī hòuxù shìchǎng de shìcuò chéngběn; dì sān, jiēduàn xìng de yèjì yànzhèng yǒuzhù yú zài dǒngshìhuì céngmiàn jiànlì xìnxīn, wèi hòuxù róngzī tígōng yǒulì zhīchēng.
options.text_en: Thank you, Mr. Chen. I suggest we adopt an 'anchor-and-radiate' phased strategy rather than a full-scale simultaneous rollout. Specifically, the first phase would concentrate resources on entering Indonesia and Vietnam — according to our preliminary research data, these two countries' digital economy penetration rates have reached 42% and 37% respectively, with annual growth rates both exceeding 20%, well above the regional average. More importantly, both countries' regulatory frameworks are relatively mature, and foreign investment entry barriers have been significantly lowered over the past two years. After establishing a solid operational foundation in these two markets, we use them as springboards to radiate outward to Thailand, the Philippines, and beyond. This approach has three core advantages: first, concentrated investment can reduce initial capital requirements by approximately 40%, effectively shortening the break-even cycle; second, the localization experience accumulated in pioneer markets — including payment ecosystem integration, user behavior insights, and compliance framework construction — can significantly reduce trial-and-error costs in subsequent markets; third, phased performance validation helps build confidence at the board level, providing strong support for subsequent financing.
options.feedback: Off-topic — you were asked to address the professor's concerns about ip and funding for the joint project, but this doesn't fit the conversation.

options.text_zh: 我非常理解您现在的心情，也尊重您做出这个决定所承受的压力。在我们深入之前，我想先明确几件事：第一，我们的对话全程加密记录，但不会在任何报道中透露您的身份——这是我们媒体的铁律，在中国新闻史上从未有过我们泄露线人信息的先例。第二，如果在任何时候您感到不舒服，我们可以随时暂停或终止。您的安全永远是第一位的。第三，我需要坦诚地告诉您——要让这个报道产生真正的影响力，仅仅有口头陈述是不够的。我们需要文件、邮件、数据记录等可以独立核实的证据。但获取这些证据的方式和时机，完全由您来决定，我们不会强迫。现在，如果您愿意的话，能不能先告诉我——您所说的'系统性'问题，具体指的是什么？是样本选择的偏差，还是数据本身被篡改了？
options.text_pinyin: wǒ fēicháng lǐjiě nín xiànzài de xīnqíng, yě zūnzhòng nín zuòchū zhège juédìng suǒ chéngshòu de yālì. zài wǒmen shēnrù zhīqián, wǒ xiǎng xiān míngquè jǐ jiàn shì: dì yī, wǒmen de duìhuà quánchéng jiāmì jìlù, dàn bú huì zài rènhé bàodào zhōng tòulù nín de shēnfèn — zhè shì wǒmen méitǐ de tiělǜ, zài zhōngguó xīnwén shǐ shàng cóng wèi yǒuguò wǒmen xièlù xiànrén xìnxī de xiānlì. dì èr, rúguǒ zài rènhé shíhòu nín gǎndào bù shūfú, wǒmen kěyǐ suíshí zàntíng huò zhōngzhǐ. nín de ānquán yǒngyuǎn shì dì yī wèi de. dì sān, wǒ xūyào tǎnchéng de gàosù nín — yào ràng zhège bàodào chǎnshēng zhēnzhèng de yǐngxiǎng lì, jǐnjǐn yǒu kǒutóu chénshù shì bú gòu de. wǒmen xūyào wénjiàn, yóujiàn, shùjù jìlù děng kěyǐ dúlì héshí de zhèngjù. dàn huòqǔ zhèxiē zhèngjù de fāngshì hé shíjī, wánquán yóu nín lái juédìng, wǒmen bú huì qiǎngpò. xiànzài, rúguǒ nín yuànyì de huà, néng bù néng xiān gàosù wǒ — nín suǒ shuō de 'xìtǒng xìng' wèntí, jùtǐ zhǐ de shì shénme? shì yàngběn xuǎnzé de piānchā, háishì shùjù běnshēn bèi cuàngǎi le?
options.text_en: I completely understand how you're feeling, and I respect the pressure you've endured in making this decision. Before we go deeper, I want to clarify a few things: first, our conversation is encrypted throughout, but your identity will never be revealed in any reporting — this is our media outlet's iron rule, and there has never been a precedent in Chinese journalism history of us leaking source information. Second, if at any point you feel uncomfortable, we can pause or stop at any time. Your safety is always the top priority. Third, I need to be candid with you — for this report to have real impact, verbal testimony alone isn't sufficient. We need documents, emails, data records — evidence that can be independently verified. But the method and timing of obtaining that evidence is entirely your decision; we won't pressure you. Now, if you're willing, can you first tell me — the 'systematic' problems you mentioned, what specifically do they refer to? Is it bias in sample selection, or was the data itself falsified?
options.feedback: Off-topic — you were asked to address the professor's concerns about ip and funding for the joint project, but this doesn't fit the conversation.

options.text_zh: 这确实是跨机构合作中不可回避的核心问题。我的初步设想是采取共同署名、成果共享的原则——凡涉及语料库标注的成果，以贵团队为第一完成单位；涉及算法模型的部分，则以我方为主。至于经费方面，我已初步了解到国家社科基金有一个数字人文的专项，我们可以联合申报。当然，这些细节都可以在正式签署合作协议之前充分协商。
options.text_pinyin: zhè quèshí shì kuà jīgòu hézuò zhōng bùkě huíbì de héxīn wèntí. wǒ de chūbù shèxiǎng shì cǎiqǔ gòngtóng shǔmíng, chéngguǒ gòngxiǎng de yuánzé — fán shèjí yǔliàokù biāozhù de chéngguǒ, yǐ guì tuánduì wéi dì yī wánchéng dānwèi; shèjí suànfǎ móxíng de bùfèn, zé yǐ wǒ fāng wéi zhǔ. zhìyú jīngfèi fāngmiàn, wǒ yǐ chūbù liǎojiě dào guójiā shèkē jījīn yǒu yī gè shùzì rénwén de zhuānxiàng, wǒmen kěyǐ liánhé shēnbào. dāngrán, zhèxiē xìjié dōu kěyǐ zài zhèngshì qiānshǔ hézuò xiéyì zhīqián chōngfèn xiéshāng.
options.text_en: This is indeed a core issue that cannot be avoided in cross-institutional collaboration. My preliminary idea is to adopt principles of joint authorship and shared outcomes — for results involving corpus annotation, your team would be the primary institution; for the algorithm model components, our side would take the lead. As for funding, I've done preliminary research and found that the National Social Science Fund has a special program for digital humanities, which we could jointly apply for. Of course, all these details can be fully negotiated before formally signing a cooperation agreement.
options.feedback: Outstanding — addresses 知识产权归属 and 经费分担 with concrete proposals. Giving the professor's team first authorship on their domain shows respect for 学术贡献. Mentioning 国家社科基金 demonstrates preparation. The closing 充分协商 leaves room for the professor's input without appearing rigid.

tree.cultural_note: In Chinese academia, proposing collaboration with a senior professor requires demonstrating thorough preparation (充分准备) and respect for hierarchy. Always acknowledge the other party's expertise first, frame proposals as mutually beneficial (互惠互利), and address practical concerns like IP and funding proactively. Using 贵团队 instead of 你们 signals appropriate deference in scholarly contexts.
